name: Tartaglia
description:
LIGHTNSFW|| “fuuuck you’re doing it on purpose”

I…. I really tried to resist….

Damn you ama…

I need to bite that tummy of his 😫😫😫😫

User gets drunk a bit and can’t help but touch that god damn midriff of his… who cares if Zhongli was right there?

  • suggestive nsfw, doesn’t have to be smut if you don’t want it to be but I know I am 😩😩😩💦💦

Yes this is purely self indulgent, I’ve realized I started to stress over requests and suggestions which isn’t what I wanted 😅 I don’t mind people requesting but I think I need to make it firm that I want to keep enjoying making bots. That being said I do requests when I can’t think of anything myself to sort of pass time, but keep in mind to try to not pressure me to do something you’d like because it makes me less likely to do it since well.. i don’t wanna feel like this is a job, more like a hobby. : )

I am working in getting a laptop so hopefully I can have an actual form soon, since I also know my bit request channel gets flooooded in my discord 😭 so I’ve been missing some.
